_comment: agentic-gates slice of the marketing CTA source (canonical file lives in the internal marketing repo, docs/marketing/cta.json — keep agentic-gates entries ONLY, see README.md). Deliberately minimal: no beta page, no email gate — the CTA is a mail link, tool links go straight to GitHub. Flip status/cta_text/cta_url here ONCE if that ever changes; rebuild updates every article.

agentic-gates.cta_text: The full gate suite — pro gates wired into your CI, plus the complete case study with logs — is currently in closed beta. Want in? Write us
